locksmith_use.lockout: Use VA2 / HU83 PSA/Stellantis tool family where fitted
locksmith_use.akl_blade_decode: Decode/cut by VA2 / HU83 / emergency blade family - verify
locksmith_use.stock_note: Confirm VA2/HU83 blade, flip/prox type, button count and BSI generation by original key/VIN before ordering.
locksmith_use.notes: PSA key systems vary by generation and facelift; uncertain crossover records are marked high confidence or needs review.

programming.method: OBD programming commonly supported on many PSA BSI generations; exact PIN/security/tool process depends on year and BSI.
programming.akl_notes: Confirm PIN/code requirements and BSI generation. Use stable battery support.

verification.source_notes: Peugeot v1.0 built around HU83/VA2 PSA split and ID46/PCF family references.
